content.en:
Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian wandered around on the Galanbao ship.

In fact, all the shops sold here are owned by some of the high-level owners of the Garan Treasure Ship, and the people who run the shops are ordinary employees.

From this, it can be seen that there are also many factions on the Galanbo ship, otherwise it is enough to open a big shop.

The treasures sold in each store are different, and the treasure resources sold in some stores are really ordinary, but some stores sell a large number of precious things, which shows that the background is very hard.

At this time.

Ye Tian came to the largest shop of the Garan Treasure Ship, and the treasures sold here were undoubtedly the most precious, and there were many of them and complete in kind.

Ye Tian looked at it here for a long time, and finally set his sights on another treasure.

【Strange Blood Pupil】

This is a higher extradimensional thing, but it is not a complete higher extradimensional thing.

According to the introduction, the Strange Blood Pupil, a truly complete high-level extradimensional thing, is a strange tree, which is covered with a large number of blood pupils, and this is only one of the strange blood pupils.

Although it is a crippled high-level extra-dimensional thing, it does not contain a lot of extra-dimensional power, but it is far beyond the medium-level extra-dimensional thing.

"What are the side effects of this weird blood pupil?"

Ye Tian asked.

The 033 worker stared at Ye Tian in surprise, after all, the high-level extradimensional things, and the peak realm gods could not be fused, so he asked what he was doing with this.

This thing was prepared for the half-step transcendent realm, and Ye Tian was obviously not a half-step transcendent realm.

However, he still patiently introduced: "This guest, the weird blood pupil is suitable for the half-step extra-dimensional realm, but even the half-step extra-dimensional realm does not dare to fuse it, once it is fused, it will be attacked by a strange force, and after a long time, even the will will will collapse, or go crazy." Even the true extradimensional power could not erase the strange power in the strange blood pupils. Moreover, the weird blood pupil will also affect the extradimensional Dao species, and it is almost impossible to break through to the extradimensional realm. Of course, it's not impossible to eliminate the side effects, if you can find some purification resources and spend a long time to eliminate the side effects little by little, it shouldn't affect too much, but that kind of purification superdimensional treasure is too rare, and our Ghalan treasure ship doesn't have it. "

"What's the use of the weird blood pupils?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"After the strange blood pupil is fused, it can expand the perception a lot, and it can also spy on areas that could not be snooped on (affj) before. Moreover, the weird blood pupil can also be combined with a superdimensional technique, which can spy on the essence of the superdimensional power and help to comprehend the superdimensional power, but this is very frustrating, after all, those who can fuse it are half-step superdimensional realms, and they have long comprehended the superdimensional power. Of course, it's very helpful for tracking and finding all kinds of things. For example, this territory will soon attract extradimensional storms, and if the strange blood pupils are fused, even if it is an extradimensional storm, it will not affect the exploration. Otherwise, in the extradimensional storm, the area that the peak realm god spied on was very small, and even the will would be torn apart by the extradimensional storm. However, the strange blood pupil can ignore extradimensional storms and can easily explore an area. If it is used to chase and kill enemies, and if you want to escape under the tracking of the strange blood pupil, it will be almost impossible......"

This employee said a lot, and it also made Ye Tian completely understand the value of this strange blood pupil.

But alas, this is another very chicken thing.

However, the Galan Treasure Boat is not afraid that no one will buy these chicken things, maybe there will be a half-step extradimensional realm with a solution, so buy it!

If there is really no half-step extradimensional realm to buy, then put it here, and it won't occupy a place anyway.

"Weird blood pupils, I want it!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, you want it?"

The employee of the Galan Treasure Ship was shocked, this is a great side effect, and if the peak realm god dares to fuse it, wouldn't he be looking for death.

In this case, Ye Tian still dares to buy?

Is this too much Garanbao to use up?

"Guest, the Strange Blood Pupil sells 600,000 Gala Treasure Coins, and there is no bargaining. The employee said.

Ye Tian nodded.

This price is not expensive, if it weren't for this side effect, the value of its ability to assist in comprehending the power of the extradimensional dimension alone would not be able to buy millions of Galanbol coins.

After all, any treasure that helps to comprehend the power of the extradimensional is of exaggerated value.

For example, the Garanbao ship sells a resource to assist in the comprehension of extradimensional powers, called the Netherworld Treasure Leaf, which is many times more precious than the extradimensional epiphany.

The Extradimensional Epiphany only lasts for a short time, but the Nether Leaf can last for a long time, but it is too expensive, requiring sixteen million Gala Treasure Coins.

Even Ye Tian was reluctant to buy it.

Moreover, he can't buy Netherworld Treasure Leaves, because to buy Nether Treasure Leaves, he doesn't just need Garan Treasure Coins, but also several other resources, and only by finding those special resources can he exchange them for Nether Treasure Leaves.

Sixteen million Gala Treasure Coins, plus several special extra-dimensional resources that even Ye Tian didn't know, could buy Nether Treasure Leaves.

Obviously, the powerhouse behind that shop needs those resources very much, but the value of those resources is not as good as Nether Treasure Leaf, so it requires an additional cost of sixteen million Garanbao Coins.

"The value of the treasures that assist in the comprehension of the power of the extradimensional is too high, and the value of the extradimensional elves must be unimaginable!"

Of course, the value of an extradimensional elf is not comparable to this Galanbol ship.

The super-dimensional elf is the weakest existence comparable to the half-step super-dimensional realm, and the best is comparable to the extra-dimensional realm, who dares to provoke it, and it is not easy to find, if the half-step extradimensional realm dares to track the super-dimensional elves, it is possible to fall.

Not to mention the mere sixteen million Galanbol coins, even if it is one billion Galanbol coins, it is far less than a superdimensional elf.

So.

Ye Tian didn't dare to fight the idea of that Netherworld Treasure Leaf at all.

Now, he was able to buy the weird blood pupil, and he was already very excited in his heart.

To him, this thing is worth an unknown number of times more than the Nether Treasure Leaf.

The other half-step extradimensional realms didn't dare to bear the price of the strange blood pupil, but he didn't care.

Soon.

Ye Tian paid for the Blue Treasure Coin and bought the Strange Blood Pupil.

Next.

Ye Tian continued to wander around, but he didn't find anything too good.

In fact, the real good things, the Jialanbao ship will not be taken out, and the so-called good things that are taken out have some side effects, and the high-level of the Jialanbao ship can't look down on them, or other extra-dimensional resources that are very ordinary in the territory, but they are very valuable to the peak realm gods of their territory, so they will be taken out.
